features: ☕【V-Sharp Mouth Design】Showvigor Milk Frothing Jug ，It ensures that the milk froth is poured slowly and precisely without dripping, and the wonderful latte art won't mess. Now you can freely unleash your imagination and creativity! With a little practice and use of our 'tools', you can create beautiful patterns on cappuccinos like a coffee master.

☕【Food Grade Professional Quality】Unlike other 201 stainless steel milk jug, our unique feature of our milk frother jug is that they are made of food grade 304 stainless steel. Its corrosion resistance, high temperature resistance, and collision resistance ensure long-term use. Choose high-quality and food grade materials to ensure your and your family's health and safety. Easy to clean, can be cleaned with a dishwasher.

☕【Clear Measurement Scale】Unlike other milk jug,Showvigor Milk Frothing Jug has clear internal graduated measurement lines, making it easier to control the amount of milk or cream per cup of coffee. Also you can use it to measure any liquid like serving milk, cream, water, juices, batter mixes, smoothies etc.

☕【Ergonomic Handle】Having good tools can help you achieve twice the result with half the effort.The heat-resistant handle keeps your hands cool and easy to grip. Even if you work for a long time, you will not feel sore hands. Easy and precise control of pouring speed and direction, especially for beginners.

☕【Unleash Your Creativity】The accompanying latte art pen features an ergonomic grip and slender nib design, allowing you to effortlessly control flow and achieve complex patterns and details. Whether you are a beginner or lack professional experience, this pen is user-friendly and easy to use.For coffee masters, it is a useful tool that can create more difficult and visually appealing patterns.
